name: radio_scale_peppy
description: Scale FM Overlay 1.10.2 with deep-idle resident standby, visible FPS cap and shared overlay owner support.
author: OpenAI for Stefan

volumio_info.details: 1.10.2 adds true deep-idle hidden standby, a hard visible FPS cap, and shared overlay owner handling via /tmp/mediastreamer_active_overlay.json while preserving all existing call methods and the classic fallback spawn path.
volumio_info.changelog: 1.10.2 - deep idle hidden standby, visible FPS cap, shared overlay owner marker, coarse hidden runtime reload cadence, unchanged public call methods and renderer service path.

pluginInfo.details: 1.10.2 adds true deep-idle hidden standby, a hard visible FPS cap, and shared overlay owner handling via /tmp/mediastreamer_active_overlay.json while preserving all existing call methods and the classic fallback spawn path.
